name: Barry Bennett, Carson America
subject: Bring a guest to lunch with Ben
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27867558:26794972915:m:1:876315805:6316EE9F24B93ABEED63EC8E6EC80EA5:r)
---
|

Peter,

Ben announced earlier this week that his campaign will be flying one lucky supporter like you to join him for a private lunch in Dallas, Texas on May 30. Today, we'd like to expand that offer.

**The winner of our "Lunch with Ben" contest will now be able to bring along one guest.**

[**To be automatically entered, please donate $5 or more to Carson America now**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27867558:26794972915:m:1:876315805:6316EE9F24B93ABEED63EC8E6EC80EA5:r)**.

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27867558:26794972915:m:1:876315805:6316EE9F24B93ABEED63EC8E6EC80EA5:r)
---
**
**And lastly, our contest ends this Saturday, so there's only a few more days to go!**

Thanks for everything you do.

Sincerely,

Barry Bennett
Campaign Manager
Carson America

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS CONTEST** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this contest. You may enter contest without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27867559:26794972915:m:1:876315805:6316EE9F24B93ABEED63EC8E6EC80EA5:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "LUNCH WITH BEN" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27867560:26794972915:m:1:876315805:6316EE9F24B93ABEED63EC8E6EC80EA5:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to Dallas, Texas, transportation, lunch at a location of the committee's choosing, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This contest is sponsored by Carson America. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

| | |

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: In case you missed it...
body:
**Friend - I wanted to make sure you saw my email this week.**

When I announce my candidacy, I will be running to win in 2016. Please let me know you stand with me during the final days before my announcement on June 1 by **[making a critical financial contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27886455:26798095114:m:1:877327319:D755589F02F7EAD0507C9A3FAA71D9C8:r)**.

Thank you for your continued support.

\- Lindsey

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Just a few minutes ago I told _CBS This Morning_ that I will announce my decision about running for President on Monday, June 1st in my hometown of Central, South Carolina.**

The next president we elect will face the critical task of steering our nation back to a path of prosperity and security. We need someone who will do more than just talk about our nation's problems. We need a leader who is willing to tackle the tough issues head on and find bipartisan solutions.

If I decide to run for President, I will do everything possible to defeat those who want to destroy our nation and the values for which we stand. And if I do run, I will need a huge army of supporters and the funds necessary to run a winning campaign.

**[Would you please let me know that I can count on your support if I decide to run?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27886455:26798095114:m:1:877327319:D755589F02F7EAD0507C9A3FAA71D9C8:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27886455:26798095114:m:1:877327319:D755589F02F7EAD0507C9A3FAA71D9C8:r)

Over the next two weeks, I will continue listening to Americans like yourself who are concerned about what the future holds. I will discuss my ideas and conservative solutions for steering our country back onto a path of stability and strength.

Thank you for your friendship. Exciting days are ahead.

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. There are two weeks until I make my announcement on June 1. Friend, you can be assured that if I run for the Republican nomination for President, I will run to win. Will you join my team today **[by making a contribution of $25, $50 $100, or whatever you can afford?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27886455:26798095114:m:1:877327319:D755589F02F7EAD0507C9A3FAA71D9C8:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27886455:26798095114:m:1:877327319:D755589F02F7EAD0507C9A3FAA71D9C8:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is8elPd1NT).

name: Alexandra
subject: Shut down the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Senator Paul has SHUT DOWN the Senate.

He's in hour 2 of his filibuster to stop illegal domestic spying.

**[Will you"Stand with Rand" and join the filibuster](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892434:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)**?

Establishment politicians in Washington are fuming.

They were counting on jetting back home after sneaking through a renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" and the NSA's illegal bulk data collection program ahead of a holiday weekend.

Fellow Conservative, he's holding the floor because the Bill of Rights is non-negotiable.

He's standing for our right not to have our phone records illegally intercepted by the government.

He's standing for our right to be free from warrantless search and seizure.

**[Will you stand with him](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892434:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)**?

If you agree your phone records are none of the government's business, please join Senator Paul's filibuster right away.

He's going to speak until he can speak no more.

But our strength doesn't lie with one senator.

It rests in the millions of Americans outside the beltway demanding their government abide by the Constitution.

**[So please"Stand with Rand" by joining the filibuster today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892434:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)**.

And after you join the filibuster, please **[chip in a contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892434:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)** so Senator Paul can mobilize grassroots conservatives to turn up the heat on Congress and END President Obama's illegal domestic spying.

| ****[**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892434:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r "http://www.randpaul.com/f/stop-spying-filibsuter?sr=rhf052015a")
**JOINED THE FILIBUSTER?**
**## NO SIGNATURE ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892435:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892436:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892437:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892438:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892434:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)

In Liberty,

Alexandra

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892439:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892440:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27892441:26810611547:m:1:879035888:7369B0FA4B4652C544A91AE6FE0B07A8:r)

name: ElizabethforRand2016@gmail.com
subject: Video: Senator Paul's Filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27897100:26815304488:m:1:879035888:6E3166ABF08824901F0F1BDF052688D7:r)

Fellow Conservative,

Can you believe it? Senator Rand Paul has shut down the Senate for almost 7 hours now fighting against illegal domestic spying!

He recorded a special video message to explain why we need to STOP warrantless spying right now.

**[Please take a few moments to watch it and add your name to join the filibuster](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27897100:26815304488:m:1:879035888:6E3166ABF08824901F0F1BDF052688D7:r)**.

There isn't a moment to waste. The Washington Machine is going to throw everything at Senator Paul to break his filibuster of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" and illegal NSA spying programs.

So if you haven't already, **[sign your petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27897100:26815304488:m:1:879035888:6E3166ABF08824901F0F1BDF052688D7:r)** to Stand with Rand and make it clear to Congress that American patriots like you will not back down from this fight.

If you have already signed, please forward this email to your friends and family.

And after signing, **[please chip in your most generous contribution to help stop these illegal spying programs](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27897100:26815304488:m:1:879035888:6E3166ABF08824901F0F1BDF052688D7:r)**.

It's important you and I help Senator Paul rally as many people as we can today to stand for freedom.

We're counting on your support, Fellow Conservative.

| ****[**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27897100:26815304488:m:1:879035888:6E3166ABF08824901F0F1BDF052688D7:r "http://www.randpaul.com/f/stop-spying-filibsuter?sr=rhf052015a3")
**JOINED THE FILIBUSTER?**
**## NO SIGNATURE ##******
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27897101:26815304488:m:1:879035888:6E3166ABF08824901F0F1BDF052688D7:r)

name: Jessica Ennis, MarcoRubio.com
subject: Marco’s birthday - Vegas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42136646:17156926083:m:1:1349778030:17833A81158BC5DC7E5CBB6730222BFF:r)
---
Peter, Next week is Marco's birthday. He'll be celebrating in Las Vegas at a party hosted by Rick Harrison, from Pawn Stars. One very lucky supporter will get to be on hand to wish Marco a happy birthday in person. **[_Donate $5 or more and you 'll be entered to win our latest contest. Click here now._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42136647:17156926083:m:1:1349778030:17833A81158BC5DC7E5CBB6730222BFF:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42136647:17156926083:m:1:1349778030:17833A81158BC5DC7E5CBB6730222BFF:r) We'll fly you to Vegas for the big party on Thursday. We'll put you up in a hotel on the Strip. You'll get to meet Marco & Rick Harrison. It's an awesome opportunity and I want you to enter and win. **Hurry, because you must enter by Sunday at midnight.** **[_Visit our website and enter now._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42136647:17156926083:m:1:1349778030:17833A81158BC5DC7E5CBB6730222BFF:r)** Jessica Ennis Political Director Marco Rubio for President
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42136648:17156926083:m:1:1349778030:17833A81158BC5DC7E5CBB6730222BFF:r)

Marco Rubio Las Vegas Birthday Contest Rules -Contest ends May 24, 2015
-Limit one entry per individual
-Make a contribution and also enter
-[You can also enter here without making a contribution.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42136651:17156926083:m:1:1349778030:17833A81158BC5DC7E5CBB6730222BFF:r)

Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. [To enter by making a contribution, click here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42136647:17156926083:m:1:1349778030:17833A81158BC5DC7E5CBB6730222BFF:r). [To enter without making a contribution, click here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42136651:17156926083:m:1:1349778030:17833A81158BC5DC7E5CBB6730222BFF:r). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on May 19, 2015 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Sunday, May 24, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Saturday, May 31, 2014. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: one round trip coach airfare to Las Vegas, Nevada, with an approximate retail value of eight hundred dollars ($800); admission to Marco Rubio's Las Vegas Birthday Party Hosted by Rick Harrison, with an approximate retail value of five hundred dollars ($500); one night's stay at a Las Vegas hotel, with an approximate retail value of two hundred dollars ($200); ground transportation costs must be covered by the winner. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of the United States and are at least 21 years of age.. Prize not redeemable for cash. The Sponsor is Marco Rubio for President, PO Box 558701, Miami, FL 33255-8701.

The Promotion begins on May 19, 2015 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Sunday, May 24, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Saturday, May 31, 2014. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: one round trip coach airfare to Las Vegas, Nevada, with an approximate retail value of eight hundred dollars ($800); admission to Marco Rubio's Las Vegas Birthday Party Hosted by Rick Harrison, with an approximate retail value of five hundred dollars ($500); one night's stay at a Las Vegas hotel, with an approximate retail value of two hundred dollars ($200); ground transportation costs must be covered by the winner. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of the United States and are at least 21 years of age.. Prize not redeemable for cash. name: Gov. Scott Walker
subject: This is important >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI2ODUzNzQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxOTcwNDk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

A high quality education should be in reach for all children. To achieve that, states and local governments, not federal bureaucrats, are best equipped to lead. Washington should not be in the business of acting like a national school board with rigid rules and a stifling compliance mentality.

To create an educational system that is suited best to each child we must:
✓ Give more power to the states to decide how to use their resources and measure student success;
✓Give school districts more flexibility to determine the right curriculum and hire the right teachers;
✓Give schools more opportunities to innovate and experiment;
✓Give teachers more rewards for successes and opportunities for professional growth;
✓Give parents more choices and better information to make those choices;
✓Give children more reasons to hope and more ways to achieve their dreams.
[**SIGN THE PETITION DEMANDING MORE LOCAL CONTROL OF EDUCATION >>>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI2ODUzNzQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxOTcwNDk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Education for our children and grandchildren is of utmost importance. In Wisconsin we made some tough choices and have been able to implement reforms that has made quality education accessible to thousands of children that would have previously been stuck in failing schools. I believe that, like Wisconsin, states across our country are better equipped to make the best decisions on educating their children than bureaucrats in Washington.

[**If you agree with me that we must demand more local control of our educational system, sign our petition.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI2ODUzNzQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxOTcwNDk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Together we can make a difference,

Scott Walker
__
__
__
__
__

**

****
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Our American Revival. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Our American Revival's online community. If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Our American Revival, click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=22685374&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxOTcwNDk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

To create an educational system that is suited best to each child we must: ✓ Give more power to the states to decide how to use their resources and measure student success; ✓Give school districts more flexibility to determine the right curriculum and hire the right teachers; ✓Give schools more opportunities to innovate and experiment; ✓Give teachers more rewards for successes and opportunities for professional growth; ✓Give parents more choices and better information to make those choices; ✓Give children more reasons to hope and more ways to achieve their dreams. name: Robby Mook, Hillary for America
subject: I want you to meet Hillary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Don't miss this chance. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2ODY0OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxOTg0NDU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

I want you to meet Hillary in person.

No need to be nervous -- Hillary's excited to meet you, too.

So what do you say -- do you want to meet her? How about meeting her at our first campaign rally?

**[Just add your name and be automatically entered -- we'll even cover the flight and hotel.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2ODY0OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxOTg0NDU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

If you win, you'll get to know Hillary one-on-one (along with your guest, that is). You'll get to see in person -- and from the start! -- how exciting this campaign is.

**Sign up now, and have your shot at meeting Hillary during our biggest campaign event so far:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2ODY0OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxOTg0NDU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Hope to see you there,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI2ODY0OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxOTg0NDU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI2ODY0OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxOTg0NDU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI2ODY0OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxOTg0NDU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $2000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI2ODY0OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxOTg0NDU1S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI2ODY0OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxOTg0NDU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
